title: larix gmelinii f. viridis
intro: Larix gmelinii f. viridis, also known as the green Russian larch, is a variety of the Larix gmelinii tree, a deciduous conifer native to the mountainous regions of Russia and China. This tree has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and resin. The health benefits of Larix gmelinii f. viridis are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the resin of the Larix gmelinii f. viridis tree is often used in traditional medicine to make ointments, tinctures, and infusions for its therapeutic properties.
